'''Aryzah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].

==Biography==
Aryzah was caught in the [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] [[Gravity well/Legends|well]] of the [[Tyus Cluster/Legends|Tyus Cluster]] [[Black hole/Legends|black holes]]. Although she was killed, her [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] remained distinct, and later rescued the [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] [[Kinnin Vo-Shay]] from the Cluster. Vo-Shay had no interest in becoming a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], but Aryzah continued counseling him. Eventually, the two traveled to [[Morado]], where Vo-Shay met [[Nyo]], a young man who wanted to buy a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] despite the fact that they were illegal under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] law. After a series of events, Vo-Shay was able to help Nyo acquire the lightsaber. He then introduced Nyo to Aryzah, who agreed to [[Jedi training/Legends|train]] him as a Jedi.<ref name="TLH" />
